## 1. shai-core

Cross-cutting coding standards, general-purpose agents, and universal workflows. Every project should install this.

### 1.1 Instructions

| #     | Tool Name | applyTo | Priority | Status | Related |
| ----- | --------- | ------- | -------- | ------ | ------- |
| C-I01 | `shai-coding` | `**` | Must | 🟢 |  |
| C-I02 | `shai-package-json` | `**/package.json` | Must | 🟢 |  |
| C-I03 | `shai-documentation-standards` | `docs/**/*.md,**/README.md` | Should | 🟢 |  |

### 1.2 Skills

| #     | Tool Name | Priority | Status | Related |
| ----- | --------- | -------- | ------ | ------- |
| C-S02 | `shai-tdd-feature` | Should | 🟢 | T-S02, C-I01 |
| C-S12 | `shai-software-design` | Must | 🟢 | C-I01 |

---

## 3. shai-firebase

Firebase ecosystem: Cloud Functions, Hosting, emulators. Add Firebase to projects and scaffold well-structured Cloud Functions.

### 3.1 Instructions

| ----- | --------- | ------- | -------- | ------ | ------- |

## 4. shai-nextjs

Next.js App Router conventions, scaffolding, and page generation. Install alongside shai-typescript and shai-core for any Next.js project.

| ----- | --------- | -------- | ------ | ------- |
